primaryMeaning: To say, speak, utter, or express a thought or statement.
quranicRelevance: Extremely frequent, denoting: 1) The act of speaking or commanding (e.g. قال 'He said'). 2) The speech or Word of God (قَوْل / كَلَام) (e.g. 39:18 'who listen to speech and follow the best of it'). 3) The Quran itself as the Word of a noble messenger (قَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ) (e.g. 69:40). 4) Setting forth opinions or false claims (تَقَوَّلَ) (e.g. 52:34).

keyDerivations.meaning: To say, speak, command, or state.
To fabricate sayings; to attribute false statements to someone.
A saying, word, speech, or statement (pl. أَقْوَال).
A word, speech, or utterance (e.g. 'their saying' in 43:88).

figurativeOrRareUsages: To speak through action or condition (e.g. 'the wall said...').
discardedNoise: Taking a midday nap (قيلولة) which is from a different root (قيل) but sometimes confused.
summaryEn: The root قول refers to speech, command, and expression. In the Quran, it describes human speech, divine communication, parables, and the condemnation of fabricating words against God (تَقَوُّل).
summaryAr: يدور جذر قول حول النطق والتعبير والقول. ويستخدم في القرآن الكريم لوصف الحديث البشري، والوحي الإلهي، والقول الحق، والتحذير من افتراء الأقوال وكذبها (تقوَّل).
rawText: المَقُولَاتُ العَشْرُ , in logic, The Ten Predicaments, or Categories; namely, الجَوْهَرُ Substance, الكَمُّ Quantity, الكَيْفُ Quality, الإِضَافَةُ Relation, الأَيْنُ Place, or where, المَتَى Time, or when, الوَضْعُ Collocation, or posture, المِلْكُ Possession, or having, الفِعْلُ Action, or doing, and الإِنْفِعَالُ Passion, or suffering. اِقْتَالَ عَلَيْهِ 8 , (S,) or عَلَيْهِمْ, (K,) i. q. تَحَكَّمَ, (S,) or اِحْتَكَمَ. (K.) See مُؤْتَالٌ. تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْهِ 5 He lied against him. (Har, p. 256.) قَالَ 1 . The objective complement of قال, meaning He said, or what is termed مَقُولُ القَوْلِ, must be a complete proposition, or a word signifying at least one complete proposition, as كَلَامًا; or a word signifying a command or the like; or a word significant of a sound, termed إِسْمُ صَوْتٍ: it may be a verb; but cannot be an inf. n., as عِبَادَةٌ. (Gr.) [This is what is meant where] it is said in the Keshsháf, العِبَادَةُ لا تُقَالُ. (Kull, p. 327.) === قَالَ لَهُ signifies خَاطَبَ له: قال عَنْهُ, رَوَى عنه: قال عَلَيْهِ, اِفْتَرَى عليه: قال بِهِ, حَكَمَ به: and قال فيه, اِجْتَهَدَ فِيهِ. (Marg. note in Additions to a copy of the KT.) === قَالَ فِيهِ فَمَا اتَّرَكَ, i. e. اِجْتَهَدَ فِيهِ: see تَرَكَ. === قَالَ عَلَيْهِ, aor. ﹹ, He lied, or said what was false, against him. (TA in art. تلو.) See تَقَوَّلَ. === قَالَ فِيهِ and عَنْهُ He said of him, or it, such a thing. === قَالَ بِكَذَا He asserted his belief in such a thing, as a doctrine or the like: a well-known meaning. === قَالَتِ العَيْنَانِ The eyes made a sign [as though saying...]. (TA.) === قَالَ بِرَأْسِهِ He made a sign with his head: (TA:) or a motion. (Ham, p. 242.) === قَالَ بِيَدِهِ He took [with his hand]. (TA.) === قَالَ بِرِجْلِهِ He walked, or struck [with his leg, or foot]. (TA.) === قَالَ بِثَوْبِهِ He raised his garment. (TA.) === قَالَ بِالمَآءِ عَلَى يَدِهِ He poured the water on his arm or hand. (TA.) === قَالَ فِيهِ He spoke against him; vituperated him. === قَالَ شِعْرًا lit., He said, or spoke, or put forth, or uttered, or gave utterance to, or recited, poetry; he spoke in verse; he poetized, or versified. === قَالَ He made a sign; syn. أَوْمَأَ. (Ham, p. 601, where see other meanings: see also p. 242 of the same: and see Mgh.) قَالَ بِيَدِهِ [He made a sign with his hand, meaning to say...]. (A trad. cited voce حَطَّ; and another voce حَرَّفَ.) Also, He struck his hand upon a thing. (Mgh.) See an ex. voce. أَشْرَبَ. قَالَةٌ : see فُوَّهَةٌ, near the end. قَوَّالٌ , &c., Good in speech: or loquacious; or copious in speech; chaste, or perspicuous, in speech; and eloquent. (K.) === إِبْنُ أَقْوَالٍ The man who talks much. (TA in art. بنى.) قَوْلٌ A saying; something said: and speech, or diction. === صَعُبَ عَلَيْهِ القَوْلُ [Diction, or speech, was, or became, difficult to him]. (K in art. جبل.) قَيْلٌ and 🡻مِقْوَلٌ: see زَعِيمٌ. قِيلٌ : see exs. voce أَصْبَحَ and voce صِرَّى. === قِيلَةٌ [A saying]. (M, art. أبد.) مَقُولُ القَوْلِ The thing said: as كَذَا in the phrases قَالَ كَذَا and يُقَالُ كَذَا. See قَالَ. مِقْوَلٌ : see قَيْلٌ.
